failure_modes.text: A system can drift to low performance when bad results quietly reset the standard instead of triggering correction.
failure_modes.mitigation: Set explicit performance standards and alarm thresholds so that bad results trigger correction instead of quietly resetting the baseline.

failure_modes.text: Impulsivity can push the team into action before enough feedback has been gathered to understand the consequences.
failure_modes.mitigation: Gather enough feedback before acting: impulsivity that precedes understanding creates oscillation, not progress.

failure_modes.text: The implementation gap appears when analysis describes what to do but the loop never closes into how the system will actually do it.
failure_modes.mitigation: Close the loop from analysis to execution: describe not just what to do but how the system will actually do it and when it will know whether it worked.

premortem_questions.text: What core standards have we failed to meet in the past, and how are we ensuring those same metrics remain absolute this quarter?
premortem_questions.source_quote: What core standards have we failed to meet in the past, and how are we ensuring those same metrics remain absolute this quarter?

premortem_questions.text: Have we detailed how this will be executed, or only what should be done?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Have we detailed how this will be executed, or only what should be done? Is the strategy embedded into the continuous workflow, or is it a static document?

premortem_questions.text: Are we mistreating this system because we are unaware of the delays, limiting factors, or false boundaries influencing the results?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Are we mistreating this system because we are unaware of the delays, limiting factors, or false boundaries influencing the results?

heuristics.text: Refine the next move iteratively based on what the last output revealed instead of restarting from scratch.
Run the goal-problem-diagnose-design-do cycle continuously so results feed back into the next round of action.
Use an iterative define-build-test rhythm that revisits earlier stages when later feedback reveals a better path.

curation_notes.summary: The source is strong on loop closure, adaptive revision, and implementation discipline, so the chunk set stays close to those mechanisms.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor product-analytics or multi-agent expansions where the raw source already gives stronger system-loop content.
open_questions: The second premortem question is shortened for chunk use, but it stays directly grounded in the raw implementation-gap countermeasure.

allies: The raw ally section is strong on systems thinking, metacognitive feedback, and cognitive load theory.
antagonists: The raw antagonist section is strong on confirmation-bias and inside-view distortions, but the current id surface is thinner than the prose in places.
structured_tensions: The raw source explicitly preserves tensions against circle-of-control and optionality.
